metadata.siteDescription: Modern music streaming and discovery platform with advanced audio features and visual patterns
metadata.ogAlt: Starchild Music - Modern music streaming platform
metadata.trackNotFoundDescription: The requested track could not be found.

metadata.searchResultsFor: Search results for "{query}" on Starchild Music

home.tagline: Find tracks instantly, then keep playback going with queue and smart mix.
home.spotifySavePrompt: Spotify features now live in Settings instead, using your own Spotify app values. Save your Spotify client ID, secret and username to use the spotify features (WIP).
home.resultsCount: {count, plural, one {# track found} other {# tracks found}}
home.continueListeningSubtitle: Pick up where you left off
home.continueListeningEmpty: Play something to build your continue list.
home.recentlyPlayedEmpty: Recent plays appear here after playback.
home.madeForYouSubtitleGenre: Built from your favorites and {genre} curation
home.madeForYouSubtitle: Built from your favorites and listening patterns
home.madeForYouEmpty: We are building personalized picks for you.
home.playlistsForYourTasteEmpty: Taste-based playlists will appear after we learn more from your listening.
home.newReleasesEmpty: No fresh releases found yet. Try again in a moment.
home.openLibraryDescription: open library and create your own
home.mobileStartPrompt: Tap Shuffle to start instantly, or search for something specific.
home.desktopStartPrompt: Search songs, artists, and albums to build your listening flow.

queue.emptyDescription: Add tracks to start building your queue
queue.autoQueuedTracks: Auto-queued {count, plural, one {# track} other {# tracks}}
queue.selectionTip: Tip: Click to select • Shift+Arrow to multi-select • Del/Backspace to remove
queue.smartQueueRefreshUnavailable: Smart queue refresh is not available yet
queue.smartQueueUnavailable: Smart queue is not available yet
queue.noSmartTracksFound: No smart tracks found for this song
queue.addedSmartTracks: Added {count, plural, one {# smart track} other {# smart tracks}}
queue.removedFromQueueSummary: Removed {count, plural, one {# track} other {# tracks}} from queue
queue.numberOfTracksHint: Number of smart tracks to add to the queue
queue.similarityStrictDescription: Very similar tracks, mostly from track radio
queue.similarityBalancedDescription: Mix of similar tracks and related artists
queue.mobileSelectionTip: Tip: Tap to play • Long-press to select • Drag handle to reorder

signin.heading: Tune the start page and optionally sign in

signin.banned: Your account has been banned. If you believe this is an error, please contact support.
signin.genreHint: You can leave this empty and change it later.
signin.genreUnavailable: Genre presets are not available right now.
signin.noProviders: No sign-in providers are currently configured.

trackRedirect.notRedirectedPrefix: If you are not redirected, open

about.title: About - Starchild Music
about.description: Learn about the team behind Starchild Music
about.whyDescription: We wanted to make our self-made API put to use by providing a frontend for it. This project serves as both a practical application and a showcase of modern web development techniques.
about.developmentApproachDescription: Built through team and pair programming sessions, combining expertise across frontend, backend, and design.

library.confirmClearHistory: Clear your full listening history? This cannot be undone.
library.confirmClearNonFavorites: Remove all non-favorite tracks from history? Favorite history entries will be kept.
library.noTracksForPlaylist: No tracks available to save as a playlist
library.noTracksForSmartQueue: No tracks available to build smart queue
library.showingLatest100: Showing the latest 100 tracks in this section.
library.removedTracksBanner: Removed {count, plural, one {# track} other {# tracks}}

library.savedPlaylistSummaryPartial: Saved {count, plural, one {# track} other {# tracks}} to "{name}" ({failed} failed to add)

library.clearedNonFavorites: Removed {count, plural, one {# non-favorite history entry} other {# non-favorite history entries}}

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Customize your listening experience
settings.signInDescription: Please sign in to access settings
settings.backgroundPlaybackDesc: Keep audio playing when the app is in the background
settings.languageDescription: Choose the language used throughout the app

equalizer.disabledToKeepPlayback: Disabled to keep background playback running.
equalizer.webAudioRequiresInteraction: Web Audio API requires user interaction
equalizer.adjustInstruction: Drag sliders to adjust • Range: -12dB to +12dB

settingsSpotify.profileDescription: These Spotify values are saved on your account, not just this device. Your Spotify feature profile becomes active for your user as soon as the client ID, client secret, and username are all present.
settingsSpotify.localValuesHint: This form was prefilled from local browser data. Save once to sync the Spotify profile to your account.
settingsSpotify.activationHint: Activation is automatic once all three Spotify fields are saved.
settingsSpotify.spotifySetupRefreshFailed: Failed to reload the saved Spotify profile
settingsSpotify.savedProfileTestHint: This check uses the Spotify profile currently saved on your account.
settingsSpotify.savedProfileTestDirtyHint: This check uses the last saved Spotify profile. Save first if you want to test the values currently shown in this form.
settingsSpotify.spotifyCredentialTestRequestFailed: Failed to test the saved Spotify profile

spotify.signInPrompt: Sign in with Discord to view your synced Spotify feature profile.
spotify.pageDescription: Saved Spotify app credentials now unlock a separate playlist feature connection. This keeps Discord as the only app login while making playlist migration and translation possible per user.
spotify.connectedNotice: Spotify playlist features are connected. Your playlists are now available below for migration work.
spotify.localFallbackNotice: Local Spotify values were found on this device, but they have not been synced to your account yet. Save them from Settings before connecting playlist features.
spotify.playlistAuthDescription: This is a separate Spotify authorization step for playlist and migration features. It does not affect app login and only uses the saved Spotify app profile for your account.
spotify.savedProfileSummary: A compact view of the saved Spotify app profile powering public playlist access.
spotify.redirectUri: Redirect URI for your Spotify app
spotify.redirectUriHint: Add this URI to your Spotify app before starting the playlist connection flow.
spotify.browseDescription: Once connected, your Spotify playlists appear here. This is the first step toward translating them into normal Starchild playlists backed by Deezer tracks.
spotify.finishConnection: Finish the playlist feature connection above to browse Spotify playlists here.
spotify.noPlaylistsReturned: No Spotify playlists were returned for this connected account yet.
spotify.noTrackRows: No track rows were returned for this playlist yet.
spotify.selectPlaylistPrompt: Select a playlist to inspect its tracks and prepare it for migration.
spotify.settingsIncomplete: Finish saving your Spotify app profile in Settings before connecting playlist features.
spotify.authMissing: Connect Spotify playlist auth before importing playlists into Starchild.
spotify.profileOnlyConnection: This Spotify session only has basic profile access. Reconnect with playlist consent before importing playlists.
spotify.credentialsRejected: Spotify rejected the saved Client ID or Client Secret. Update the app credentials in Settings.
spotify.usernameNotFound: Spotify could not find that username. Check the username in Settings.
spotify.playlistUnavailable: That playlist is private or unavailable to app-based public playlist access.
spotify.rateLimited: Spotify rate limited the request. Try again in a moment.
spotify.publicAccessNotice: No Spotify login is involved here. The server uses your saved app credentials to request an app token and read public playlists for the saved username only.
spotify.playlistMetadataFallback: Public playlist metadata is available now. Playlist translation and migration logic can build on this inventory later.
spotify.importPlaylistDescription: Create a normal Starchild playlist from this Spotify source. We'll keep the tracks we can match and report anything left unresolved.
spotify.importReadyHint: We'll preserve the Spotify order for matched tracks and show you anything that needs attention.
spotify.importProgressTitle: Matching tracks and building your playlist
spotify.importProgressDescription: We're fetching the source playlist, matching what we can, and turning it into a native Starchild playlist.
spotify.importSuccessDescription: {name} is ready as a native Starchild playlist.
spotify.importPartialDescription: The playlist was still created successfully. {unmatchedCount, plural, one {# track remains unmatched} other {# tracks remain unmatched}}{skippedCount, plural, =0 {.} one {, and # track was skipped by the backend.} other {, and # tracks were skipped by the backend.}}
spotify.noUnmatchedTracks: Everything in this import matched cleanly.
spotify.importAmbiguousCandidatesShow: Show {count, plural, one {# similar Deezer track} other {# similar Deezer tracks}}
spotify.importAmbiguousCandidatesHide: Hide {count, plural, one {# similar Deezer track} other {# similar Deezer tracks}}
spotify.importAlternativeSearchShow: Search Deezer alternatives for this track
spotify.importAlternativeSearchHint: Try a different title, featured artist, or album version if the first results miss.
spotify.importAlternativeSearchResultsTitle: {count, plural, one {# alternative found} other {# alternatives found}}
spotify.importAlternativeSearchNoResults: No Deezer alternatives matched that search yet.
spotify.importAlternativeSearchEmpty: Enter a title or artist before searching for alternatives.
spotify.importAlternativeSearchFailed: We couldn't search Deezer right now. Try again in a moment.
spotify.importInvalidPlaylist: That Spotify playlist link or ID looks invalid. Check it and try again.
spotify.importNoMatches: We couldn't match any tracks from that Spotify playlist yet.
spotify.importUnavailable: Spotify import isn't available from the app backend yet.
spotify.importReconnectSpotify: Reconnect or refresh your saved Spotify setup in Settings before importing.
spotify.importBackendProtected: The current backend deployment is protected by Vercel authentication, so the app cannot reach the Spotify import route yet.
spotify.importBackendRouteMissing: The current backend deployment could not handle the Spotify import request. This looks like a missing or outdated import route, not a missing playlist.
spotify.importLegacyAuthContract: The import backend is still expecting legacy Spotify auth. It should accept the playlist payload already loaded in the app.
spotify.importUpstreamFailure: Spotify import failed while fetching or converting tracks. Try again in a moment.
spotify.importFailedGeneric: Failed to import the Spotify playlist.

auth.authTakingLong: Authentication is taking longer than expected.
auth.chooseProviderToContinue: Choose an OAuth provider to continue.
auth.noProvidersAvailable: No OAuth providers are currently available.
auth.spotifyDenied: Spotify authorization was denied. Discord is now the only supported sign-in method.
auth.spotifyOAuthRemoved: Spotify OAuth sign-in has been removed. Use Discord to sign in, and configure Spotify features from Settings instead.
auth.spotifyConnectionFailed: Spotify playlist connection could not be completed. Try again.

profile.shareText: Check out {name}'s music on Starchild Music!
profile.profileNotFoundDescription: This profile doesn't exist or is private.

rightRail.startPlaybackToPopulate: Start playback to populate your queue.

welcome.title: Welcome to Starchild Music
welcome.subtitle: Search and play from 50 million+ tracks instantly
welcome.startPlayingHint: Start playing to unlock the visualizer experience

guest.title: Tune the start page and optionally sign in
guest.description: Save local tuning defaults now. You can still skip and start listening immediately.
guest.firefoxVisualsDescription: Firefox can struggle with advanced live visuals, so they are disabled by default to keep playback smooth.
guest.visualsEnabled: Visuals are enabled for this browser.

trackMenu.signInToAddToPlaylists: Sign in to add to playlists
trackMenu.movedToEnd: Moved "{title}" to the end of the queue

playlistMenu.onlyPublicCanShare: Only public playlists can be shared
playlistMenu.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This cannot be undone.
playlistMenu.mergeComingSoon: Merge functionality coming soon! This will allow you to combine tracks from multiple playlists.

cookie.message: We use functional cookies to ensure the best possible experience on our platform. These are necessary for the website to function properly. We do not use trackers, third-party cookies, advertising, invasive analytics, or anything similar. By clicking "Accept", you agree to the use of these functional cookies. You can find more information in our privacy policy.

error.unexpectedError: We're sorry, but something unexpected happened. Please try again.
error.errorFallbackMessage: We encountered an unexpected error. Please try again.
